+======================+===============+=======================================================+
| 0       910A         | OK            | 65.0        42                  0    / 0                 |
| 0                      | 0000:01:00.0  | 45          8000  / 16384                            |
+======================+===============+=======================================================+
| 1       910A         | Warning       | 70.0        55                  0    / 0                 |
| 1                      | 0000:02:00.0  | 30          4000  / 16384                            |
